sidebar.deleteChatConfirm: Delete this chat? This can't be undone.

login.tagline: Projects, tasks, brainstorming, calendar and budget — in one place.
login.agreement: By continuing you agree to the <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Your profile and preferences.
settings.badImage: That file doesn't look like a readable image.
settings.workspaceLabelHint: The word after your name in the sidebar — up to 25 characters.
settings.labelSaveFailed: Could not save the workspace label.
settings.emailNote: Linked to your Google account — it can't be changed here.
settings.deleteAccountWarning: Permanently deletes your account and every piece of data: projects, tasks, chats, boards, budget and the calendar connection. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirm: Delete your account and ALL of its data permanently? This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteFailed: Could not delete the account. Please try again.

projects.title: Projects
projects.subtitle: Spaces for bigger pieces of work.
projects.empty: No projects yet. Create your first one.
projects.deleteConfirm: Delete “{{title}}”? Its tasks and board will be deleted too. This cannot be undone.
projects.notFound: Project not found or you don't have access.
projects.boardHint: A dedicated whiteboard for this project.

tasks.title: Task Bar
tasks.subtitle: Everything on your plate, sorted by priority tier.

brainstorm.boardMissing: This board doesn't exist or you don't have access to it.
brainstorm.switchHint: Click to switch boards, double-click to rename

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.subtitle: Google Calendar events and Compos task due dates.
calendar.notConnected: Google Calendar isn't connected (or the session expired). Sign out and sign back in with Google to reconnect — Compos tasks with due dates are still shown below.
calendar.apiDisabled: The Google Calendar API is turned off in the Google Cloud project. Enable it in the Google Cloud console (APIs & Services → Library → Google Calendar API), wait a couple of minutes, then retry.

budget.title: Budget
budget.plannedAside: {{amount}} in planned costs already set aside
budget.plannedDesc: Upcoming payments you already know about. Anything due before the end of the month is subtracted from the daily allowance above.
budget.noTransactions: Nothing logged yet. Add your first expense to start the running log.
budget.budgetHint: Set an overall cap, split it by category, or both. Overall takes precedence for the gauge.
budget.addPlannedFailed: Could not add the planned cost: {{message}}

chat.title: Chat
chat.askAnything: Ask anything — powered by Claude Haiku 4.5.
chat.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

shareModal.note: Invited people sign in with Google using the invited email. Share links grant access to whoever opens them after signing in.

sharePage.invalid: This share link is invalid or was revoked.
